meta.siteDescription: Frankie Schulte вҖ” an archive of bodies, light, movement, and temporary signals.

home.headline: Frankie Schulte
home.intro: Light passes through the body. The image keeps what the moment leaves behind.

work.headline: Photos
work.intro: Organized by subject, though never entirely by logic. Enter each sequence as evidence of something already goneвҖ”bodies, rooms, and passing light held briefly in place.

about.headline: I photograph what remains after the moment loses its name.
body: Hi, IвҖҷm Frankie. I make photographs of people, gatherings, performances, and the places I move through. IвҖҷm drawn to the point where an ordinary moment begins to feel unfamiliarвҖ”when light changes the body and the image becomes something more than evidence.

My approach is observant and collaborative. I give direction when it creates an opening, then step back when the moment begins to speak for itself. The goal is not to make everything perfect, but to leave enough space for something honest, strange, and impossible to repeat.
about.portraitAlt: Temporary demo portrait; replace with a photograph of Frankie.
about.availability: Available for portraits, graduations, events, concerts, editorial commissions, and select experiments in visual translation.

inquire.headline: Tell me what youвҖҷre making.
inquire.intro: Send a date, location, and a fragment of what you are imagining. That is enough to begin. IвҖҷll reply from my regular email so we can give the idea a shape.

categories.title: Portraits & Graduation
categories.intro: A face enters the frame and returns slightly altered. Portraits of presence, transition, and the private distance between being seen and being known.

cover.alt: Graduation portrait used as temporary demo work.

categories.title: Events
categories.intro: Rooms gather their own weather. These photographs follow the gestures, details, and brief collisions that survive after the gathering disappears.

cover.alt: Guests gathered during an evening event.

categories.title: Concerts
categories.intro: Bodies assemble beneath manufactured suns. Sound becomes movement, movement becomes evidence, and the room leaves behind a temporary mythology of its own.

categories.title: Personal / Travel
categories.intro: Places observed after they have stopped explaining themselvesвҖ”quiet studies of distance, atmosphere, and the things that appear when no one has asked for an image.
